home.description:
All your subscriptions at a glance
Securely, without linking financial data

login.title: Subscription History
login.description:
Connect your Gmail account to
manage all your subscriptions effortlessly

googleAccounts.title: Linked Gmail Accounts
googleAccounts.description: Gmail accounts used for subscription analysis
googleAccounts.connectPrompt: Connect a Gmail account to start analysis

disconnectDialog.title: Disconnect Gmail Account
disconnectDialog.description:
Disconnect {email}?
Access to this account's data will be securely removed, and you will no longer see subscriptions from it.

emptySubscriptions.title: No subscriptions found
emptySubscriptions.description: We couldn't find any active subscriptions.

dialog.title: Guest Demo
dialog.description: Try the app with a demo account. 70 sample emails are pre-linked.

dialog.title: Try Sublog as Beta User
dialog.description: Please register as beta user to try Sublog with your google account

loginDialog.title: Beta User Login
loginDialog.description: Please login with your registered Google account

successDialog.title: Request Submitted
successDialog.description: Thank you for registering as beta user.
successDialog.instruction: We will send confirmation email within 24 hours. Please check email titled Invitation to test Sublog from Google Cloud in your email inbox. You must click accept to enable access.

ErrorEmpty.title: Service unavailable
ErrorEmpty.description:
Something went wrong.
Please try again later.

data_collection.title: Data Collection
data_collection.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your email address and account credentials. We also collect data from your Gmail account to analyze subscription information, subject to your authorization.

data_usage.title: Data Usage
data_usage.content: Your data is used solely to provide and improve our subscription management services. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

data_security.title: Data Security
data_security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. All communications are encrypted, and we follow best practices for data storage and access control.

user_rights.title: Your Rights
user_rights.content: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also revoke authorization for Gmail account access through your Google account settings.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy or our data practices, please contact us through our support channels.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using our service, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

user_obligations.title: User Obligations
user_obligations.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

service_modification.title: Service Modification
service_modification.content: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time without prior notice. We shall not be liable to you or any third party for any modification or discontinuation.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account at any time for violation of these terms or for any other reason at our sole discretion.

governing_law.title: Governing Law
governing_law.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which our service is operated.
